title: Accelerating Quantum Computing Research Using AI and Robotics
description: Chapter 1 of dossier QC-Accelerate-002: a recap-bridge of the prior DOI-archived lineage on AI-accelerated quantum computing — the self-protecting cat-qubit floor, the bias-preserving-gate wall, and an AI search's kept negative — rebuilt as living, self-verifying figures with every claim labeled and cited, opening a survey of where AI and robotics genuinely shorten the road to fault tolerance. An Open Dossier publication: executable claims under CI, published adversarial review, auto-DOI and auto-timestamped releases.
